feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: F110 - To add fields in the AVL
entry.content:
Tcode : F110

To add the below fields in the ALV  for proposal run.

  1. With Holding tax 

      2. Net due date

entry.title: number range issue
entry.content: Va42 in conditions tab is this Std sap limit to 9 digit or can this be increased to more than 10 because, SFDC is sending the value of 10 characters and SAP is throwing error, while trying to enter manually also we are facing this error

entry.title: Problem in closing projects in CJ20N
entry.content: Problem in closing projects in CJ20N

entry.title: Ich möchte parallel ein 8-stelliges, externes Nummernintervall für PPS-Fertigungsaufträge nutzen.
entry.content: Wir nutzen derzeit einen gemeinsamen, 7-stelligen internen Nummernkreis für alle PPS-Fertigungsaufträge (Auftragstyp 10). Da dieser zu Ende geht, möchten wir parallel ein 8-stelliges, externes Nummernintervall für die gleiche Gruppe verwenden, um sowohl das alte interne als auch das neue externe Intervall für alle Auftragsarten nutzen zu können. In CO82 war es uns nicht möglich, diese Konstellation zu erstellen. Wir möchten wissen, ob es grundsätzlich möglich ist, und falls ja, wie wir diese Konstellation einrichten können.

entry.title: Message output is not triggering automatically while maintaining schedule lines via ME38
entry.content: We have set up ZSCC output in our system such that it should trigger automatically while maintaining schedule lines for scheduling agreement via ME38 but could see that it is not triggering automatically. I have attached the detailed test case along with the configuration of the output type ZSCC inthe document. Kindly check and let me know what could be the solution for this issue.

entry.title: Message output is not triggering automatically while maintaining scheduling lines via ME38
entry.content: We have created a new output ZSCC which is supposed to be triggered while maintaining scheduling lines via ME38 but it is not happening but i am able to add it manually and save it. Please refer the attachment

entry.title: SAP's EU Commitment Decision: A Win for On-Premise Customer Choice
entry.content:
Introduction

In a significant move for the SAP ecosystem, SAP and the European Commission concluded a competition investigation on July 9, 2026, regarding SAP's on-premise maintenance and support practices. This is great news for customers who manage complex on-premise environments and want more flexibility in their IT strategies.

What Happened?

The European Commission had been investigating certain aspects of SAP's on-premise maintenance and support policies. After a constructive dialogue, SAP offered commitments that the Commission accepted, closing the matter.

Key Takeaways for SAP Customers

1. Greater Transparency – SAP will make its maintenance policies more transparent, so customers know exactly what they're paying for and what options they have.
2. More Flexibility – Targeted flexibility for exceptional "shelfware" situations (software that's licensed but unused), giving customers relief where it matters most.
3. Freedom to Choose Support Providers – Customers can now choose different ERP support providers, reducing vendor lock-in.
4. Consistent Execution – Improved guidance, training, and independent oversight to ensure policies are applied consistently worldwide.
5. Cloud Not Affected – This decision relates solely to on-premise maintenance. SAP's cloud offerings remain unchanged.

Why This Matters

For organizations still running SAP on-premise (which is a large majority) this means:

- More predictable costs
- Ability to modernize toward cloud/AI at your own pace
- Less pressure to migrate purely due to support pricing

As SAP itself stated: "The added clarity and flexibility support customers as they modernize toward an AI-enabled autonomous enterprise at their own pace."

My Thoughts

This is a positive step for the entire SAP community. It shows SAP is listening to customer concerns and willing to adapt. Whether you're planning an S/4HANA Cloud migration or maintaining your on-premise ECC system for the foreseeable future, these commitments give you more breathing room and choice.

References

- SAP Official Announcement
(https://news.sap.com/2026/07/sap-welcomes-european-commission-decision-conclu
ding-investigation-on-premise-maintenance-support-policies/)
- SAP's Detailed Flexibility Blog
(https://news.sap.com/2026/07/evolving-maintenance-support-practices-greater-f
lexibility-sap-customers/)

entry.title: HOW to use CGI_XML_CT_V9 with ECC EHP5 SAPKH60505
entry.content: I need to know what are the prerequisites to use  CGI_XML_CT_V9 with ECC EHP5 SAPKH60505 , what are the OSS notes to be implemented, and if the SAP release is relevant or not for ISO20022 2019 payment files

entry.title: T811s Table currency field (FACURR) deriving details.
entry.content:
1. How the currency field(FACURR) is deriving in T811S table.
2. In KSU3 or KSU2 or KSU1 we are able to see currency field only when the sender rule type is fixed amount and fixed rate, but for sender rule type posted amounts the currency field is not available. can you please explain the reason.
3. If the currency field for the sender rule type posted amounts changed in T811s to some object currency(company code) from Controlling area currency, will there by any impact during the allocation cycles run.
For ex: USD to GBP.

entry.title: T811s Table currency field (FACURR) not changing when segment sender rule changed
entry.content:
If the currency field for the sender rule type posted amounts changed in T811s to object currency(company code) from Controlling area currency, will there be any impact during the allocation cycles run.
For ex: USD to GBP.

entry.title: Sale order number is not displaying in CM25
entry.content:
Sale order number is not displaying in CM25.

As per requirement, we have added the sales order field label in CY38 for respective Layout and executed the CM25 to see the sales order details. But, system showing sales order field as blank in EDQ system.

Please fins the attached document for you reference and help me to resolve this issue ASAP. 

https://nttdata-my.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/personal/10245635_nttdata_com/Documents/Desktop/Sales%20order%20Number%20not%20showing%20in%20CM25.docx?d=w30ce800ad7c44cdaaceb07391abecd3e&csf=1&web=1&e=aPtJDr

entry.title: Sale order number is not displaying in CM25
entry.content:
Sale order number is not displaying in CM25.

As per requirement, we have added the sales order field label in CY38 for respective Layout and executed the CM25 to see the sales order details. But, system showing sales order field as blank in EDQ system.Please fins the attached document for you reference and help me to resolve this issue ASAP.

entry.title: Tolerance defined 0 in the delivery
entry.content: the tolerance in the delivery doc. = 0. although the quantity of the delivery item is bigger than in the same item in the order. How can it be ?

entry.title: F110 Automatic Vendor Bank Selection for ACH/Wire Payments Across Multiple Company Codes
entry.content: Vendor has multiple bank accounts (ACH and Wire) maintained in vendor master data. The same vendor is used across multiple company codes. Invoice posting is being automated through OCR/AI, so manual selection of Partner Bank Type (BVTYP) is no longer reliable. We need SAP ECC F110 to automatically determine the correct vendor bank account based on company code and/or payment method. Is there a standard configuration available before considering a custom enhancement?

entry.title: Posting rules in area 25 are different from area 01 for the asset.
entry.content: While testing getting the error “Posting rules in area 25 are different from area 01” for the Asset class AC030100 under the company code SIN for the Asset 30000001102 Capitalized on 01.03.2026.

entry.title: Multiple capacity planner groups in 1 work center
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have an urgent question: Is it possible to manage the factory work load like this, that we see 1 work center in 2 capacity planner groups? Can I link two MRP controllers to a single work center? I need to be able to see the production orders from both MRP controllers in the capacity planning (CM01 capacity leveling), but I would rather not change the MRP controller.

Thank you in advance for your answers!

Kind regards,

Manuel

entry.title: Adv_ICo Sales_Configuration : movement type determination in Value Chain Monitoring
entry.content:
received error while configuring : Adv_ICo Sales_Configuration :  movement type determination in Value Chain Monitoring.

Error message : our input for the field Issuing Valuated Stock in Transit is not allwd. Message No. SD_SLS_INTERCOMPANY730

Reference Document : Adv_ICo Sales_Configuration Guide : OP 2022

entry.title: number range for the Object RV_SAMMG reaching critical zone
entry.content:
Dear forum,

In our EWA reporting, basis has shared the below critical message appearing in our Production Environment:

Number range for the Object RV_SAMMG reaching critical zone (95% currently).

Could you please advise us what action should we take?

 

Regards,

Gopal Turaga

entry.title: number range for the Object RV_SAMMG reaching critical zone
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

EWA report in our Production SAP System is giving the message:  number range for the Object RV_SAMMG reaching critical zone

Please advise what action we need to take.

Regards,

gopal turaga

entry.title: ERROR AU 133 ASSET
entry.content:
Standard Transaction F-43:
1. POSITION) MOVEMENT 100 ON ASSET 130
2. POSITION) SUPPLIER

RECORDING ATTACHED.
ERROR AU133 IS TRIGGERED ON AREA 50.
THE ASSET DOES NOT HAVE AREA 50.

AREA 50 IS DISABLED FOR THE ASSET CLASS.

WAITING AN URGENT RESOLUTION.
THANK YOU.

BR
